LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS CARAVAN CANOPY INT'L INC. AND THE SPORTS AUTHORITY INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO LOS ANGELES IS GRANTED ON THE GROUNDS THAT NONE OF THE DEFENDANTS RESIDE IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, THE ONE CALIFORNIA DEFENDANT RESIDES IN LOS ANGELES COUNTY, AND NO INJURY IS ALLEGED. C.C.P. 395(A) & 395.5. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CARAVAN CANOPY INT'L INC. and THE SPORTS AUTHORITY INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue To Los Angeles is granted on the grounds that none of the Defendants reside in the City and County of San Francisco, the one California defendant resides in Los Angeles County, and no injury is alleged. C.C.P. 395(a) & 395.5. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg
